# test

A test app with a tap (to click) and count those clicks. 

## Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Frontend | Next.js + TypeScript |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui |
| Build | Vite |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth |
| Deploy | Vercel |

## Getting Started

```bash
pnpm install
cp .env.example .env.local
# Fill in your environment variables
pnpm dev
```
